name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M46397 Cream Print 】M14291 This Speedy Bandoulière 20 bag renews the brand's classic Monogram Empreinte leather, outlining the pattern in matching tones, and enriching details with striped lining, a striking lock, and a detachable chain. The compact structure holds daily essentials and is suitable for hand or crossbody carry. 13.5 x 12 x 20.5 cm (H x W x L)
